full_text:
Lady Xie 謝夫人
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Lady Xie (謝夫人)was born in Shanyin in Guiji. Wife of Sun Quan, the Lord of Wu. Was a native of Shanyin in Kuaiji. Lady Xie was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
